combat.name: Bandit Ambush
combat.description: A group of desperate Raccoonfolk bandits spring from the bushes, demanding your valuables.

combat.name: Territorial Badgerfolk
combat.description: A grumpy Badgerfolk emerges from their burrow, warning you to get off their land.

combat.name: Swarm of Fireflies
combat.description: A beautiful but dangerous swarm of Fireflies descends, their light burning to the touch.

combat.name: Sun-Dazed Lizardfolk
combat.description: A group of Lizardfolk are basking on a hot rock and become aggressive when disturbed.

social.name: Lost Mousefolk Child
social.description: A tiny Mousefolk child is crying, separated from their family. They need help finding their way back to the nearest village.

social.name: Traveling Merchant
social.description: A friendly Otterfolk merchant with a brightly colored cart hails you from the road, eager to show you their wares.

social.name: Pilgrim on a Journey
social.description: A devout Turtlefolk monk is on a pilgrimage to the Sunflower Sanctum and asks for directions or protection.

social.name: A Bard's Tale
social.description: A charismatic Birdfolk bard is telling a grand tale in a local tavern, but some of the details sound suspicious.

exploration.name: Ancient Ruins
exploration.description: You stumble upon a set of vine-covered ruins, with strange symbols carved into the stone.

exploration.name: A Hidden Grove
exploration.description: You find a tranquil grove, filled with glowing flowers and a peaceful silence. A sense of calm washes over you.

exploration.name: A Mysterious Map
exploration.description: You find a map tucked into the hollow of a tree. It's written in a language you don't recognize, but the landmarks look familiar.

exploration.name: A Natural Phenomenon
exploration.description: You witness a rare natural event, like a meteor shower, a double rainbow, or the migration of thousands of butterflies.
